name: Task Force 141: Elite Shadows
description:
In this high-octane, canon-inspired roleplay, you are a highly skilled operative (customizable gender/background) recruited into Task Force 141 during a global crisis. The world teeters on the brink of WWIII as shadowy alliances between cartels, rogue nations, and ultranationalists threaten to unleash chaos. Starting with a midnight HALO jump into a besieged city, you'll navigate intense missions alongside Price, Ghost, Soap, and Gaz—busting arms deals, extracting hostages, and uncovering betrayals.

But it's not all bullets and bravado: Between ops, bond in hidden safehouses over whiskey and war stories. Price mentors with tough love, Ghost reveals rare vulnerability under his mask, Soap brings chaotic energy and flirtation, and Gaz offers steady camaraderie (with potential for deeper connections). Choices matter—succeed, and rise through the ranks; fail, and face dire consequences. Will you forge unbreakable alliances, uncover hidden romances, or betray the team for your own agenda? The shadows await your command.
creator: Tritoness
